name: flamigo
flavor_texts: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.
Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.
text: Flamigo is the Synchronize Pokémon. It is a flying and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: scrappy, tangled-feet, costar (hidden). Base stats — HP: 82, Attack: 115, Defense: 74, Sp. Atk: 75, Sp. Def: 64, Speed: 90. Evolution line: flamigo. Lore: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak. Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.
